creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like your database file is empty. 

Look out for ./zim/index.db file and run sqlite index.db like this:

[rm@cf .zim]% sqlite3 index.db 
SQLite version 3.46.0 2024-05-23 13:25:27
Enter ".help" for usage hints.
sqlite> .tables
links          meta           pagetypes      propertynames  tagsources   
linktypes      pages          properties     tags        

What it shows?

PS. Btw, in FreeBSD we have python 3.11 already.
